<?php namespace Vonage\Messages\Channel\MMS; use Vonage\Messages\MessageObjects\AudioObject; use Vonage\Messages\MessageObjects\VideoObject; use Vonage\Messages\Channel\BaseMessage; use Vonage\Messages\MessageTraits\TtlTrait; class MMSVideo extends BaseMessage { use TtlTrait; protected string $channel = 'mms'; protected string $subType = BaseMessage::MESSAGES_SUBTYPE_VIDEO; protected bool $validatesE164 = true; public function __construct( string $to, string $from, protected VideoObject $videoObject ) { $this->to = $to; $this->from = $from; } public function validatesE164(): bool { return $this->validatesE164; } public function toArray(): array { $returnArray = $this->getBaseMessageUniversalOutputArray(); $returnArray['video'] = $this->videoObject->toArray(); if (!is_null($this->ttl)) { $returnArray['ttl'] = $this->ttl; } return $returnArray; } }
